queries.query: I'm done with this feature branch, what now?
finish up this development branch
implementation is complete, how should I integrate?
should I merge or create a PR for this work?
all tests pass, ready to wrap up this branch
clean up after development is done
how do I finalize this feature branch
done coding, need to decide merge strategy
wrap up this worktree work
discard this branch, work is no good
queries.reason: discard option is part of the 4 choices

queries.query: merge these branches together
queries.reason: standalone merge command, not finishing workflow

queries.query: create a PR for this
push this branch to remote
delete this old branch
I'm still working on this feature
fix these failing tests
queries.reason: tests failing, not ready to finish

queries.query: review this pull request
rebase my branch on main
start a new feature branch
what branches exist in this repo

description_before: Guides completion of development work by presenting structured options for merge, PR, or cleanup. Use when implementation is complete, all tests pass, and you need to decide how to integrate the work. Do NOT use for in-progress work or when tests are still failing.
description_after: Structured workflow for finishing a completed feature branch -- presents 4 options: local merge, create PR, keep as-is, or discard. Triggers when development work is done and all tests pass, and you need to decide the integration path. Do NOT use for standalone merge commands, standalone PR creation, branch deletion, rebasing, or any in-progress work.
